risks.summary: context schema modelled here; no persistent store contract yet (by design — modeling-only)
interruption-continuity cannot resolve checkpoint anchors per procedure
history queries and inheritance bind to incident-id; no upstream emitter
inheritance and history rules depend on per-node confidence not yet emitted
session-aware adaptations are contractual; signals not yet emitted
escalation packages are specified; no emitter wired
concurrent timelines (e.g., troubleshooting during onboarding) need explicit linkage emitter
cross-product collisions complicate context-product binding for shared accounts
incomplete-onboarding-flag relies on intent declarations not yet wired
